2211.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kharija ibn Zayd, from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him), that he was brought a case of a daughter or a sister — he gave her half and placed the remainder in the public treasury (bayt al-mal).
2211.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Kharijah ibn Zaid, dari Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia dihadapkan pada perkara seorang anak perempuan atau saudari — ia memberinya separuh dan menempatkan sisanya di baitul mal.

2212.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim, from Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him), that he said regarding the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an): 'His inheritance goes to his mother.'
2212.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim, dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata tentang anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an: 'Warisannya diberikan kepada ibunya.'

2213.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim ibn Tahman that he said: 'I heard a man ask Ata' ibn Abi Rabah about the inheritance of a child born from mutual imprecation (li'an): To whom does his inheritance belong? He said: "To his mother and her family."'
2213.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim ibn Thahman bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada 'Atha' ibn Abi Rabah tentang warisan anak yang lahir dari li'an: Untuk siapa warisannya? Ia berkata: "Untuk ibunya dan keluarganya."'

2214.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) said regarding the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an): 'If he leaves a maternal brother and his mother — the maternal brother gets a sixth and the mother gets a third, then the remainder is returned to them, so the brother ends up with a third and the mother two thirds.' Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) said: The maternal brother gets a sixth...
2214.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata tentang anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an: 'Jika ia meninggalkan saudara seibu dan ibunya — saudara seibu mendapat seperenam dan ibu mendapat sepertiga, kemudian sisa dikembalikan kepada mereka, sehingga saudara akhirnya mendapat sepertiga dan ibu dua pertiga.' Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Saudara seibu mendapat seperenam...'

2215.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi regarding the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an), if he leaves a nephew and a grandfather: 'The estate goes to the nephew.'
2215.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi tentang anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an, jika ia meninggalkan anak saudara dan kakek: 'Harta diberikan kepada anak saudara.'

2216.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib, from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him), regarding the inheritance of the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an): 'The mother gets a third, and two thirds go to the public treasury.'
2216.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib, dari Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu), tentang warisan anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an: 'Ibu mendapat sepertiga, dan dua pertiga masuk ke baitul mal.'

2217.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim, from Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'His inheritance goes to his mother, and the residual heirs on his mother's side are responsible for his blood money.' Al-Hasan said: The mother gets a third, and the rest of the estate goes to the residual heirs on the mother's side.
2217.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim, dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Warisannya diberikan kepada ibunya, dan ahli waris 'ashabah dari pihak ibunya bertanggung jawab atas diyatnya.' Al-Hasan berkata: Ibu mendapat sepertiga, dan sisa harta diberikan kepada ahli waris 'ashabah dari pihak ibu.

2218.iwh_en: It was narrated from Qatada that Ali and Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with them both) said regarding the child of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an), if he leaves his grandmother and uterine brothers: 'The grandmother gets a third and the brothers get two thirds.' Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) said: The grandmother gets a sixth and the uterine brothers get...
2218.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Qatadah bahwa Ali dan Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) berkata tentang anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an, jika ia meninggalkan nenek dan saudara-saudara seibu: 'Nenek mendapat sepertiga dan saudara-saudara mendapat dua pertiga.' Zaid ibn Tsabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Nenek mendapat seperenam dan saudara-saudara seibu mendapat...'

2219.iwh_en: It was narrated from Yunus and Humayd, from al-Hasan (al-Basri), that he said: 'His mother inherits from him' — meaning the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an).
2219.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Yunus dan Humaid, dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri), bahwa ia berkata: 'Ibunya mewarisi darinya' — yakni anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an.

2220.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Nakha'i and al-Sha'bi that they both said: 'His mother inherits from him' — meaning the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an).
2220.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Nakha'i dan al-Sya'bi bahwa keduanya berkata: 'Ibunya mewarisi darinya' — yakni anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an.

2221.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abd Allah ibn 'Ubayd ibn 'Umayr that he said: 'I wrote to a brother of mine from Banu Zurayq asking him: For whom did the Prophet ﷺ rule in the case of the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an)? He wrote back to me: "The Prophet ﷺ ruled..."'
2221.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abdullah ibn 'Ubaid ibn 'Umair bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku menulis kepada saudaraku dari Banu Zuraiq menanyakan: Untuk siapa Nabi ﷺ memutuskan dalam perkara anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an? Ia membalas suratku: "Nabi ﷺ memutuskan..."'

2222.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hisham, from al-Hasan (al-Basri), regarding the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an) who leaves his mother and the residual heirs on his mother's side: 'A third goes to his mother, and what remains goes to the residual heirs on his mother's side.'
2222.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hisyam, dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri), tentang anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an yang meninggalkan ibu dan ahli waris 'ashabah dari pihak ibunya: 'Sepertiga untuk ibunya, dan sisanya untuk ahli waris 'ashabah dari pihak ibunya.'

2223.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Amir (al-Sha'bi), from Ali and Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with them both), regarding the son of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an): 'His residual heirs are the residual heirs on his mother's side.'
2223.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Amir (al-Sya'bi), dari Ali dan Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhuma), tentang anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an: 'Ahli waris 'ashabah-nya adalah ahli waris 'ashabah dari pihak ibunya.'

2224.iwh_en: It was narrated from Yunus, from al-Hasan (al-Basri), that he used to say: 'The inheritance of a child born from mutual imprecation (li'an) goes to his mother.' I (the narrator) asked: What if he has a uterine brother? He said: 'He gets a sixth.'
2224.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Yunus, dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri), bahwa ia biasa berkata: 'Warisan anak yang lahir dari li'an diberikan kepada ibunya.' Aku (perawi) bertanya: Bagaimana jika ia memiliki saudara seibu? Ia berkata: 'Ia mendapat seperenam.'

2225.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Zuhri that he said: 'The child of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an) belongs to his mother — she inherits her prescribed share from him, and the rest goes to the public treasury.'
2225.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Zuhri bahwa ia berkata: 'Anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an milik ibunya — ia mewarisi bagian yang telah ditentukan darinya, dan sisanya masuk ke baitul mal.'

2226.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nafi', from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'When a couple invoke mutual imprecation, they are separated and may never reunite. The child is called by his mother's name — he is called son of so-and-so (his mother's name). She is his residual heir; he inherits from her and she inherits from him. And whoever accuses him of being illegitimate is flogged.'
2226.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nafi', dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika sepasang suami istri melakukan li'an, mereka dipisahkan dan tidak boleh bersatu kembali. Anak itu dipanggil dengan nama ibunya — ia disebut putra si fulanah (nama ibunya). Ibu adalah ahli waris 'ashabah-nya; ia mewarisi darinya dan ia mewarisi darinya. Dan barangsiapa menuduhnya sebagai anak haram, maka ia dijilid.'

2227.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi regarding the child of a couple who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an): 'The residual heirs on his mother's side inherit from him, and they are responsible for his blood money.'
2227.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi tentang anak dari pasangan yang telah li'an: 'Ahli waris 'ashabah dari pihak ibunya mewarisi darinya, dan mereka bertanggung jawab atas diyatnya.'

2228.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn Jubayr, from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), regarding the child of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an) — he is the one who has no father: 'His mother inherits from him, and his uterine brothers, and the residual heirs on his mother's side. If someone slanders him, the slanderer is flogged.'
2228.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'id ibn Jubair, dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), tentang anak dari perempuan yang telah li'an — ia adalah orang yang tidak memiliki ayah: 'Ibunya mewarisi darinya, dan saudara-saudara seibunya, dan ahli waris 'ashabah dari pihak ibunya. Jika seseorang memfitnahnya, si pemfitnah didera.'

2229.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Nu'man, from Makhul, that he was asked about the inheritance of a child born of a woman who invoked mutual imprecation (li'an) — to whom does it belong? He said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ assigned it to his mother, because of what she suffered — and to his uterine brothers.' Makhul also said...
2229.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Nu'man, dari Makhul, bahwa ia ditanya tentang warisan anak yang lahir dari perempuan yang telah li'an — untuk siapakah ia? Ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ menjadikannya untuk ibunya, karena apa yang ia derita — dan untuk saudara-saudara seibunya.' Makhul juga berkata...'

2230.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ikrima, from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), that a group of people disputed before Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the child of a couple who had invoked mutual imprecation (li'an). The residual heirs of the father came demanding his inheritance. Ali said...
2230.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ikrimah, dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa sekelompok orang bersengketa di hadapan Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mengenai anak dari pasangan yang telah li'an. Ahli waris 'ashabah dari pihak ayah datang menuntut warisannya. Ali berkata...'

2231.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abd al-A'la that he heard Muhammad ibn Ali (al-Baqir) narrate from Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding a person who has both male and female organs — from which side is their inheritance determined? He said: 'From whichever side they urinate.'
2231.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abd al-A'la bahwa ia mendengar Muhammad ibn Ali (al-Baqir) meriwayatkan dari Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang seseorang yang memiliki organ laki-laki dan perempuan — dari sisi mana warisan mereka ditentukan? Ia berkata: 'Dari sisi mana mereka buang air kecil.'

2232.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi, from Ali (may Allah be pleased with him), regarding an intersex person (khuntha), that he said: 'Their inheritance is determined by which side they urinate from.'
2232.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi, dari Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu), tentang orang yang berkelamin ganda (khuntha), bahwa ia berkata: 'Warisan mereka ditentukan dari sisi mana mereka buang air kecil.'

2233.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hani' that 'Amir (al-Sha'bi) was asked about a child born neither male nor female — having neither male nor female organs — but who excretes from the navel in the manner of urine and stool. He was asked about their inheritance and said: 'Half the share of a male and half the share of a female.'
2233.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hani' bahwa 'Amir (al-Sya'bi) ditanya tentang anak yang lahir tidak laki-laki dan tidak perempuan — tidak memiliki organ laki-laki maupun perempuan — namun mengeluarkan dari pusar dengan cara buang air kecil dan besar. Ia ditanya tentang warisannya dan berkata: 'Setengah bagian laki-laki dan setengah bagian perempuan.'

2234.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Asim, from al-Sha'bi, that he said: 'Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) was asked about al-kalala (one who dies leaving neither parents nor children as heirs). He said: "I will give my own opinion about it. If it is correct, it is from Allah; if it is wrong, it is from me and from Satan. I hold it to mean those other than a parent and a child." When Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) became caliph, he said...'
2234.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ashim, dari al-Sya'bi, bahwa ia berkata: 'Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) ditanya tentang al-kalalah (orang yang meninggal tanpa meninggalkan orang tua maupun anak sebagai ahli waris). Ia berkata: "Aku akan menyampaikan pendapatku sendiri tentangnya. Jika benar, itu dari Allah; jika salah, itu dariku dan dari setan. Menurutku, artinya adalah selain orang tua dan anak." Ketika Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) menjadi khalifah, ia berkata...'

2235.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Uqba ibn 'Amir al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Nothing perplexed the Companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as much as the verse of al-kalala perplexed them.'
2235.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Uqbah ibn 'Amir al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tidak ada sesuatupun yang membingungkan para Sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ seperti ayat al-kalalah membingungkan mereka.'

2236.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Amr ibn Dinar, from al-Hasan ibn Muhammad, from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'Al-kalala refers to (the deceased who left) other than a parent or a child.'
2236.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Amr ibn Dinar, dari al-Hasan ibn Muhammad, dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Al-kalalah adalah (orang yang meninggal dengan meninggalkan) selain orang tua atau anak.'

2237.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Qasim ibn 'Abd Allah, from Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him), that he used to read this verse (Q. 4:12): "If a man or woman who leaves neither ascendants nor descendants has a brother or sister" — with the addition "from the mother's side".
2237.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Qasim ibn 'Abdullah, dari Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia biasa membaca ayat ini (Q. 4:12): "Jika seseorang laki-laki atau perempuan yang diwarisi kalalah mempunyai seorang saudara laki-laki atau seorang saudara perempuan" — dengan tambahan "dari pihak ibu".

2238.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Asim ibn 'Umar ibn Qatada al-Ansari that 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) sought someone to inherit from Ibn al-Dahdaha but found no heir, so he placed the estate of Ibn al-Dahdaha...
2238.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ashim ibn 'Umar ibn Qatadah al-Anshori bahwa Umar ibn al-Khatthab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mencari orang yang mewarisi dari Ibn al-Dahdahah namun tidak menemukan ahli waris, sehingga ia menempatkan harta Ibn al-Dahdahah...'

2239.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tawus, from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), that she said: 'Allah and His Messenger are the protectors (mawla) of one who has no protector, and the maternal uncle is the heir of one who has no heir.'
2239.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawus, dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), bahwa ia berkata: 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya adalah pelindung (mawla) orang yang tidak memiliki pelindung, dan paman dari pihak ibu adalah ahli waris orang yang tidak memiliki ahli waris.'

2240.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi, from Ziyad, that he said: 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) was brought a case of a maternal uncle and a maternal aunt. He gave the maternal uncle two thirds and the maternal aunt a third.'
2240.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi, dari Ziyad, bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dihadapkan pada perkara paman seibu dan bibi dari ibu. Ia memberi paman seibu dua pertiga dan bibi dari ibu sepertiga.'

2241.iwh_en: It was narrated from Yunus, from al-Hasan (al-Basri), that Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) gave the maternal aunt a third and the paternal aunt two thirds.
2241.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Yunus, dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri), bahwa Umar ibn al-Khatthab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memberi bibi dari pihak ibu sepertiga dan bibi dari pihak ayah dua pertiga.

2242.iwh_en: It was narrated from Qays ibn Habtar al-Nahshali that he said: ''Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan was brought a case of a maternal aunt and a paternal aunt. An elder man stood up and said: I witnessed Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) give the maternal aunt a third and the paternal aunt two thirds.'
2242.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Qais ibn Habtar al-Nahshali bahwa ia berkata: ''Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan dihadapkan pada perkara bibi dari ibu dan bibi dari ayah. Seorang laki-laki tua berdiri dan berkata: Aku menyaksikan Umar ibn al-Khatthab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memberi bibi dari ibu sepertiga dan bibi dari ayah dua pertiga.'

2243.iwh_en: It was narrated from Masruq, from Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'The maternal aunt is in the position of the mother, the paternal aunt is in the position of the father, the niece (brother's daughter) is in the position of the brother, and every person of kinship (dhawi al-arham) is in the position of the relative through whom they are connected — when there is no residual heir.'
2243.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Masruq, dari Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Bibi dari pihak ibu berkedudukan seperti ibu, bibi dari pihak ayah berkedudukan seperti ayah, anak perempuan saudara berkedudukan seperti saudara, dan setiap orang yang memiliki hubungan rahim (dzawi al-arham) berkedudukan seperti kerabat yang menjadi penghubungnya — ketika tidak ada ahli waris 'ashabah.'

2244.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Dahhak ibn Qays that Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) ruled regarding the victims of the plague of Amawas: if they were equal in relation through the father's side, then the maternal relatives had priority; but if some were closer through a father, then...
2244.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Dhahhak ibn Qais bahwa Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memutuskan tentang korban wabah tha'un Amawas: jika mereka setara dalam hubungan dari pihak ayah, maka kerabat dari pihak ibu lebih berhak; tetapi jika sebagian dari mereka lebih dekat melalui seorang ayah, maka...'

2245.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abd Allah ibn Shaddad ibn al-Had that he said: 'Salim, the freed slave of Abu Hudhayfa, was killed on the Day of Yamama. His inheritance amounted to two hundred dirhams. Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Hold it until...".''
2245.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abdullah ibn Syaddad ibn al-Had bahwa ia berkata: 'Salim, bekas budak Abu Hudzaifah, terbunuh pada Perang Yamamah. Warisannya berjumlah dua ratus dirham. Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Tahanlah sampai...".'

2246.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Harith, from Ali (may Allah be pleased with him), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'The uterine brothers (from the same mother) inherit from each other, not from the half-brothers (from different mothers). A man inherits from his full brother (from both father and mother), not from his paternal half-brother.'
2246.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Harits, dari Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Saudara-saudara seibu (dari satu ibu) saling mewarisi, bukan saudara-saudara seayah saja (dari ibu yang berbeda). Seseorang mewarisi dari saudara kandungnya (dari ayah dan ibu yang sama), bukan dari saudara seayah-nya saja.'

2247.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Nu'man ibn Salim that he said: 'I asked Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him): What do you say about a man who leaves his daughter's son — does he inherit from him? He said: "No."'
2247.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Nu'man ibn Salim bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu): Bagaimana pendapatmu tentang seorang laki-laki yang meninggalkan cucu laki-laki dari anak perempuannya — apakah ia mewarisi darinya? Ia berkata: "Tidak."'

2248.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'The mother is the residual heir of one who has no other residual heir, and the sister is the residual heir of one who has no other residual heir.'
2248.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Ibu adalah ahli waris 'ashabah bagi yang tidak memiliki ahli waris 'ashabah lain, dan saudari adalah ahli waris 'ashabah bagi yang tidak memiliki ahli waris 'ashabah lain.'

2249.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tawus, from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'Distribute the obligatory shares of inheritance to their rightful heirs. Whatever remains after that goes to the nearest male relative.'
2249.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawus, dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Bagikanlah faraidh kepada ahlinya yang berhak. Adapun sisanya diberikan kepada kerabat laki-laki yang paling dekat.'

2250.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sulayman ibn Yasar, from Muhammad ibn al-Ash'ath, that a paternal aunt of his died as a Jewess in Yemen. He mentioned this to Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him), who said: 'That does not belong to you — she is inherited by the person closest to her from among the people of her religion.'
2250.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sulaiman ibn Yasar, dari Muhammad ibn al-Asy'ats, bahwa seorang bibi dari pihak ayahnya meninggal sebagai seorang Yahudi di Yaman. Ia menyebutkan hal ini kepada Umar ibn al-Khatthab (radhiyallahu 'anhu), yang berkata: 'Itu bukan hakmu — ia diwarisi oleh orang yang paling dekat dengannya dari kalangan orang-orang yang seagama dengannya.'

2251.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tariq ibn Shihab that he said: 'The paternal aunt of al-Ash'ath ibn Qays died while she was a Jewess. He came to Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) who said: "The people of her religion inherit from her."'
2251.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thariq ibn Syihab bahwa ia berkata: 'Bibi dari pihak ayah al-Asy'ats ibn Qais meninggal dunia dalam keadaan sebagai seorang Yahudi. Ia datang kepada Umar ibn al-Khatthab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) yang berkata: "Orang-orang yang seagama dengannya mewarisi darinya."'

2252.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'We do not inherit from polytheists, and they do not inherit from us.'
2252.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa Umar ibn al-Khatthab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Kami tidak mewarisi dari orang-orang musyrik, dan mereka tidak mewarisi dari kami.'

2253.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ, Abu Bakr, and Umar all said: People of two different religions do not inherit from each other.'
2253.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ, Abu Bakr, dan Umar semuanya berkata: Orang-orang dari dua agama yang berbeda tidak saling mewarisi.'

2254.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Amir (al-Sha'bi), from Umar (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'People of two different faiths do not inherit from each other.'
2254.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Amir (al-Sya'bi), dari Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Orang-orang dari dua agama yang berbeda tidak saling mewarisi.'

2255.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath, from al-Hasan (al-Basri), from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'We do not inherit from the People of the Book and they do not inherit from us — except when a man's slave or slave-woman dies.'
2255.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Asy'ats, dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri), dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami tidak mewarisi dari Ahlu Kitab dan mereka tidak mewarisi dari kami — kecuali ketika budak laki-laki atau perempuan seseorang meninggal.'

2256.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath, from al-Hasan (al-Basri), from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him), that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "We do not inherit from the People of the Book and they do not inherit from us — except a man who inherits from his slave or slave-woman."'
2256.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Asy'ats, dari al-Hasan (al-Bashri), dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Kami tidak mewarisi dari Ahlu Kitab dan mereka tidak mewarisi dari kami — kecuali seorang laki-laki yang mewarisi dari budak laki-laki atau perempuannya."'

2257.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi, from Masruq, that he said: 'Mu'awiya (may Allah be pleased with him) used to allow a Muslim to inherit from a disbeliever, but not allow a disbeliever to inherit from a Muslim.' Masruq said: 'No ruling that has emerged in Islam is more pleasing to me than this one.'
2257.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sya'bi, dari Masruq, bahwa ia berkata: 'Mu'awiyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) membolehkan seorang Muslim mewarisi dari seorang kafir, namun tidak membolehkan seorang kafir mewarisi dari seorang Muslim.' Masruq berkata: 'Tidak ada keputusan hukum yang muncul dalam Islam yang lebih menyenangkanku daripada ini.'

2258.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Amir (al-Sha'bi) that al-Mu'zila bint al-Harith died in Yemen while she was a Jewess. Al-Ash'ath ibn Qays rode to Umar to inquire about her inheritance — she was his paternal aunt. Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'That does not belong to you — she is inherited by the person closest to her from among the people of her religion.'
2258.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Amir (al-Sya'bi) bahwa al-Mu'zilah binti al-Harits meninggal di Yaman dalam keadaan sebagai seorang Yahudi. Al-Asy'ats ibn Qais berkuda menemui Umar untuk menanyakan tentang warisannya — ia adalah bibi dari pihak ayahnya. Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Itu bukan hakmu — ia diwarisi oleh orang yang paling dekat dengannya dari kalangan orang-orang yang seagama dengannya.'

2259.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Sirin that Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'People of two different faiths do not inherit from each other, and one who does not inherit does not block (other heirs).'
2259.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Sirin bahwa Umar ibn al-Khatthab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Dua agama yang berbeda tidak saling mewarisi, dan orang yang tidak mewarisi tidak menghalangi (ahli waris lain).'

2260.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Husayn, from 'Amr ibn 'Uthman, from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him), that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A Muslim does not inherit from a disbeliever, and a disbeliever does not inherit from a Muslim.'
2260.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Husain, dari 'Amr ibn 'Utsman, dari Usamah ibn Zaid (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang Muslim tidak mewarisi dari orang kafir, dan orang kafir tidak mewarisi dari seorang Muslim.'
